productName: Shatter J's Infused Pre-roll Pina Colada - 1g
description: This infused sativa pre-roll wraps Pina Colada flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of pineapple, tropical, and rose, with an upbeat, talkative energy. A little goes a long way.
